ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the player represents */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "career_start" TEXT /* Date the player started their professional career */,
  "career_end" TEXT /* Date the player ended their professional career */,
  "batting_style" TEXT /* Batting style of the player */,
  "bowling_style" TEXT /* Bowling style of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in cm */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kg */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format (e.g., Test, ODI, T20I) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the format */,
  "overs_per_innings" INTEGER /* Number of overs per innings in the format */,
  "max_overs_per_bowling" INTEGER /* Maximum overs per bowler in the format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of player statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the format */,
  "mat" INTEGER /* Number of matches played */,
  "inns" INTEGER /* Number of innings bowled in */,
  "overs" REAL /* Total overs bowled */,
  "maiden" INTEGER /* Number of maiden overs bowled */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Total runs conceded */,
  "wickets" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken */,
  "average" REAL /* Bowling average (runs per wicket) */,
  "economy" REAL /* Economy rate (runs per over) */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate (balls per wicket) */,
  "best_bowling_in_innings" TEXT /* Best bowling in an innings */,
  "best_bowling_in_match" TEXT /* Best bowling in a match */,
  "four_wickets" INTEGER /* Number of four-wicket hauls */,
  "five_wickets" INTEGER /* Number of five-wicket hauls */,
  "ten_wickets" INTEGER /* Number of ten-wicket hauls in a match */,
  "catches" INTEGER /* Number of catches taken */,
  "stumpings" INTEGER /* Number of stumpings */,
  "run-outs" INTEGER /* Number of run-outs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the team represents */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("captain_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_teams" (
  "player_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-team relationship */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the player left the team */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player in the team (e.g., Batsman, Bowler, Wicket-keeper) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_teams_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., web, mobile, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match result */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of Team 1 */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of Team 2 */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "margin" TEXT /* Margin of victory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Runs scored by the player in the match */,
  "balls_faced" INTEGER /* Balls faced by the player in the match */,
  "fours" INTEGER /* Number of fours hit by the player in the match */,
  "sixes" INTEGER /* Number of sixes hit by the player in the match */,
  "wickets_taken" INTEGER /* Wickets taken by the player in the match */,
  "overs_bowled" REAL /* Overs bowled by the player in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES match_results ("match_id")
)
